steps.title: Find the decisive signal
steps.content: Robots have “unnatural aspects” in their appearance that hinder interaction, and the features should help counteract these aspects.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content: ”Ameliorate” means to improve or lessen something negative. The other three choices mean to increase (augment), combine (coalesce), or prove (substantiate), none of which apply to reducing negative effects. That matches choice A — A is correct.
